name: Doge (The Battle Cats)
description:
Doge is the first Enemy in The Battle Cats. A 2014 mobile game by PONOS Corporation. He is pretty weak and doesn’t serve as a threat.

He is a white Shiba Inu dog with a square-ish build. With black dotted eyes, black whiskers and a black outline over his features.

Doge is featured in lots of levels in The Battle Cats, especially in the Empire of Cats selection of levels, where he is most prominent. For that reason, he is best friends with Snache, however, he is also friends with Those Guys, Hippoe, Pigge, Jackie Peng, Gory, Baa Baa, Sir Seal, Croco, Le’boin, B.B.Bunny, Kang Roo, Squire Rel, Mooth, One Horn, Teacher Bear, The Face, Ms. Sign, Assassin Bear, Shy Boy, Dark Emperor Nyandam and Teacher Bun Bun among others.

He is rivals with The Battle Cats, especially Cat, the first Cat Unit of The Battle Cats. I think you already know why...

The guy is also crash out material, let’s be honest!

We drink soda, we eat pizza. Doge drinks soda and eats pizza too.
creator: Doge Wanko
